description: RAG Web Browser - Web scraping tool for RAG pipelines. It queries Google Search, scrapes the top N pages, and returns their content as Markdown.

properties.title: URL
properties.name: url
properties.description: Enter a URL or search query. For direct URL scraping, enter the full URL (e.g., https://example.com). For Google search, enter keywords.

properties.title: Max Results
properties.name: maxResults
properties.description: Maximum number of search results to return (1-100).

properties.title: Output Format
properties.name: outputFormat
properties.description: The format of the output content.

properties.title: Scraping Tool
properties.name: scrapingTool
properties.description: Raw HTTP is fast but cannot handle JavaScript. Browser mode handles dynamic content but is slower.

properties.title: Request Timeout (seconds)
properties.name: requestTimeoutSecs
properties.description: Maximum time in seconds to wait for a request to complete (1-300).

properties.title: Max Retries
properties.name: maxRequestRetries
properties.description: Number of retry attempts for failed requests.

properties.title: Concurrency
properties.name: desiredConcurrency
properties.description: Number of parallel scraping operations. Higher = faster but more resources.

properties.title: Remove Cookie Warnings
properties.name: removeCookieWarnings
properties.description: Automatically remove cookie warning banners from pages.

properties.title: Debug Mode
properties.name: debugMode
properties.description: Enable debug logging and performance metrics.
